ddls:
CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the creator */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the creator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the creator */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the creator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creator_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "first_credit_year" INTEGER /* Year of the first credit received by the creator */,
  "num_issues_contributed" INTEGER /* Number of issues the creator has contributed to */,
  "role_details" TEXT /* Detailed roles played by the creator (e.g., script (1); pencils (1); inks (1)) */,
  "contribution_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creator_contributions_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creator_contributions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_number" TEXT /* Number of the issue */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the issue belongs to */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* Cover image of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_title" TEXT /* Title of the series */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the series belongs to */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the series started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the series ended (NULL if ongoing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "series_image" TEXT /* Image representing the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_image" TEXT /* Image representing the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_roles" (
  "issue_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue role */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "num_issues_contributed" INTEGER /* Number of issues the creator contributed to in this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_roles_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_roles_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, creator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the issue */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, review, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the contribution */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_versions_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES creator_contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_categorizations" (
  "categorization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each categorization */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the issue belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the issue belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("categorization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_categorizations_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_categorizations_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_categorizations_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creator_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the creator */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creator_followers_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creator_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
